prompt: I inherited a workspace with several Git roots and no reliable navigation notes. Inspect the actual roots, owners, commands, runtime boundaries, and reusable contracts, then create a durable map that future work can trust.
Please inspect the current dirty worktree, separate task changes from unrelated and mixed hunks, identify concrete defects, and give exact read-only staging guidance for a review.

The feature request is approved but implementation has not started. Turn it into an executable sequence of scoped tasks with owners, dependencies, validation commands, and reject criteria without editing source.

The repository root and target module are already known; decompose a multi-step migration into ordered implementation tasks, explicit interface dependencies, acceptance checks, and rollback gates before anyone writes code.

A CI check now fails with a reproducible serialization error after a recent change. Read the complete diagnostics, reproduce it, test one hypothesis at a time, and isolate the root cause and regression seam without changing files.

A browser checkout sometimes fails after a specific sequence of clicks. Correlate the application logs and request state to determine the cross-layer cause; do not merely collect screenshots or operate the page.

Review the current worktree before commit: inventory staged and unstaged files, classify ownership and mixed hunks, trace changed contracts, rank actionable defects, and provide path-level staging guidance without mutating Git.
Assess a fixed release branch revision for merge blockers and P0-P3 findings, resolving the exact revision first and keeping the assessment read-only; do not build a navigation map.

Implement the requested settings-screen change in the existing frontend, reusing its current components and data contracts, and run the repository's focused type, test, and lint checks. Do not stage or commit.

The frontend failure is already understood and the remedy is known. Apply the smallest change to the existing Vue view and its tests, preserve route and payload contracts, and validate the edit without touching Git delivery.

Implement a Rust API change across the owning crate, update the affected tests and documentation, and validate it with the pinned formatter and checks while preserving typed errors and dependency direction.

A Rust change is specified precisely: add cancellation to the existing async worker and tests, keeping the current runtime and error model. Make and validate the source edit rather than performing a general risk audit.

Audit the known frontend checkout surface read-only for state and request contracts, accessibility, and performance profiles selected by the symptoms; report severity, exact locations, evidence, and gaps without editing.

Inspect the existing frontend module against its reuse and keyboard-accessibility obligations, selecting only evidenced profiles and returning findings plus validation gaps; do not implement any remediation.

Perform a bounded, read-only audit of the named Rust worker and SQLite paths, selecting only the required concurrency, ownership, and persistence profiles and reporting evidence-backed risks and unverified gaps.
Review the Rust service's Tokio shutdown and transaction boundaries without changing code; measure the relevant paths where possible and return profile-scoped findings, not a feature implementation.

Audit only the named upload handler and tenant authorization paths for concrete security weaknesses, tracing attacker-controlled data and failure behavior without editing or claiming a whole-system certification.
Inspect the security-sensitive files changed in this pull request for authorization and secret-handling flaws, but do not assess merge readiness, staging, or unrelated review domains.

The reviewed files are approved for delivery. Stage only the listed paths, verify the staged diff, create the supplied commit, push the requested branch, and prove the resulting ref; do not open a pull request.

Use the already agreed file list to create a commit and synchronize the branch, checking remote state and final hashes while preserving unrelated work; this is authorized Git delivery, not a review report.

Prepare a local review package from the specified paths and, only after I authorize it, run one external ChatGPT review round; verify the returned findings locally and keep outbound and inbound artifacts separate.

Package the selected code and instructions for an external reviewer, but stop before opening a browser, creating a conversation, uploading, or sending anything; return only the verified local artifact.
Rewrite the supplied Chinese technical project update into clear publication-ready copy while preserving every provided fact, attribution, uncertainty, disclosure, and technical meaning.
Adapt this source-grounded Chinese release note for a concise internal announcement, retaining the author's voice and all caveats; do not verify code behavior or invent missing facts.

Open the specified web page in the available browser, verify the active URL and target state, inspect the console and network response for the reported missing control, and return direct browser evidence without changing account state.

The page and steps are known; inspect one browser-layer hypothesis by checking the rendered control and its request, retaining the evidence and stopping before any login, upload, or destructive submit.

Verify the specified native desktop client's running process and exact window, capture its identifier and a real-window screenshot after the requested observation, and report what the client itself shows without changing user state.
Check the already running desktop application's target window and capture provenance on this machine; do not substitute a web preview or browser tab for client evidence and do not restart it.
First map the workspace's real ownership and reusable contracts, then review the resulting local changes for concrete defects and commit-readiness risks, keeping both phases read-only.
Reproduce the reported settings-page crash and confirm its root cause; once the regression seam is proven, implement the targeted frontend fix and focused tests without staging or committing.
Review this worktree for ownership, contract completeness, and actionable findings, and include a bounded read-only audit of the changed frontend paths before giving the consolidated result.

Build the local package, obtain my explicit authorization, use the available browser to submit exactly one external ChatGPT review round, then archive and locally verify the attributed response and operation record.

Before implementing the requested frontend route, refresh the durable ownership and reuse notes for the affected workspace boundary; then make the source change and run its focused validation, with no Git delivery.
Implement the requested Rust worker cancellation change and, as part of the same task, run a bounded read-only audit of the touched async ownership and shutdown paths before reporting validation.
Investigate the recurring panic in the Rust parser with a reproducible hypothesis loop, and after the cause is confirmed apply the minimal typed-error fix and validate the affected tests.
